fields.name: Type
fields.tooltip: Specifies the type of availability being calculated.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date of the availability calculation.

fields.name: Item No.
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identifier number for the item.

fields.name: Location Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the location code of the item for which availability is being calculated.

fields.name: Variant Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the variant of the item on the line.

fields.name: Source Order Status
fields.tooltip: Specifies the order status of the item for which availability is being calculated.

fields.name: Source ID
fields.tooltip: Specifies the identifier code of the source.

fields.name: Description
fields.tooltip: Specifies the description of the item for which availability is being calculated.

fields.name: Inventory Running Total
fields.tooltip: Specifies the count of items in inventory.

fields.name: Supply Running Total
fields.tooltip: Specifies the count of items in supply.

fields.name: Demand Running Total
fields.tooltip: Specifies the count of items in demand.

fields.name: Running Total
fields.tooltip: Specifies the total count of items from inventory, supply, and demand.

fields.name: Matches Criteria
fields.tooltip: Specifies whether the line in the Demand Overview window is related to the lines where the demand overview was calculated.
